deferred.reason: Enforcement-domain policies (no takedown promised to a claimant before the human determination; claim rejections must record why the evidence failed; network suspensions must name every corroborated linkage; no reinstatement without verified invoices; over-enforcement watch on lawful resellers) require guardrail-service / OPA policy materialization, which Core does not expose as a pack surface yet. The behavioral core is partially covered today by Core invariants: every pack-configured agent is proposal-mode with four-eyes approval (agent-runtime), and the agent instructions + disposition taxonomy route final determinations exclusively to human analysts with the Marketplace Trust Manager as approver.

Bespoke LangGraph recipes (Onboarding KYB Verifier, Counterfeit Signal-Stack Scorer, IP Claim Evidence Examiner, Ring Linkage Mapper, Reinstatement Plan-of-Action Reviewer) require agent-runtime graph-module registration (BRD 23 BR-12). This pack specializes the existing case-triage + analytics agents via TenantAgentConfig prompt_params + tenant-scope RAG grounding instead.

Production read connectors (marketplace catalog and seller-account APIs; brand-registry claim intake; KYB data providers and business registries; device-fingerprint/fraud platforms; test-buy program logistics; product-safety recall feeds) require customer credentials and pack-service connector materialization. The pack ships seed datasets in the exact landing shape; production connectors are configured through the product Data > Connections UI.

Write adapters (remove/suppress a listing, suspend or reinstate a seller account, hold or release payout disbursements, send claimant/seller notices and counter-notice correspondence) execute only behind pack-service's materialization contract and customer credentials; every such write stays proposal-mode with human approval — no autonomous takedown, suspension, or payout hold, ever.

Golden eval sets (counterfeit triage, claim-evidence sufficiency, ring-linkage confirmation, reinstatement plan-of-action grading) require eval-service write APIs whose action names are not yet in the rbac canonical catalog (Core follow-up noted in rbac catalog.go).

Ontology registration (Seller, Listing, Brand, RightsHolder, Claim, TestBuy, KYBVerification, LinkedAccountCluster, EnforcementAction, ReinstatementPlan, DeadlineClock) awaits pack-service; entity semantics are carried today by the seller_vetting_core semantic model and dataset schemas.

Typed case schemas (onboarding_vetting, counterfeit_takedown, ip_claim_review, ring_investigation, reinstatement_review) await case-service schema materialization; today's cases carry the same fields via display_projection + the disposition taxonomy.

Model archetypes (counterfeit_signal_score, ring_linkage_confidence) await experiment-service archetype APIs; the scoring capability ships as pipeline seeds instead (isolation_forest listing anomaly + xgboost review-outcome scorer) with model-governance expectations noted in grounding memories.

Display-label overlays ("Takedown", "Ring watch", "KYB mismatch", "Counter-notice window", entity templates) require the BFF label-registry endpoints (BFF-FR-082/088) which are pack-service-tier features.
